citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a landlord reference within 5 working days when you email us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk
We have a dedicated member of staff that can give you information and tips on how to find accommodation.
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
ENSA Advice ... Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk
You can also find useful advice and guidance at scotland.shelter.org.uk and citizensadvice.org.uk

findings.text: The brochure describes a private accommodation support service with a dedicated staff member, email contact, and landlord reference provision.
The brochure signposts to ENSA Advice, Shelter Scotland, and Citizens Advice for further support.
The brochure is dated 11/12/2024, indicating it is the 2025 edition.
No emails or case notes about Anfal's brochure provision or support service access are present in the provided source materials.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Anfal's Brochure Provision / Support Service Access

### Source Reviewed
- **NAP-SRC-0014**: Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 (A5 Print).pdf (extracted text)

### Key Findings
1. The brochure describes a private accommodation support service (dedicated staff, email privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk, landlord reference within 5 working days).
2. The brochure signposts to ENSA Advice (phone 0131 229 8791, email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk), Shelter Scotland, and Citizens Advice.
3. The brochure is dated 11/12/2024 (2025 edition).

### Gaps
- No emails, case notes, or records of Anfal receiving or being directed to the brochure.
- No evidence of Anfal contacting the support service or ENSA Advice.
- No evidence of any specific interaction between Anfal and the university regarding accommodation support.

### Proposed Follow-Up
Search for internal emails, case notes, or helpdesk tickets referencing Anfal and the accommodation support service or brochure.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map: Anfal's Brochure Provision / Support Service Access

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search for any emails, case notes, or helpdesk tickets in the matter records that reference Anfal (by name or student ID) in connection with the private accommodation support service, the brochure, or ENSA Advice. Report any communications, referrals, or evidence of brochure provision.
proposed_tasks.title: Search internal records for Anfal's contact with accommodation support service

risk_flags.text: No evidence of brochure provision or support service access for Anfal found in the reviewed source.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025). The brochure describes a support service, ENSA Advice, and other resources. No emails, case notes, or records of Anfal's brochure provision or support service access were found in the provided source. A follow-up task is proposed to search internal records for any communications involving Anfal and the accommodation support service.

uncertainties.text: The absence of emails or case notes in the brochure source does not confirm that no such records exist elsewhere in the matter.
